# Practical Systems — Episode
## On-Call That Doesn’t Break People
Host: Ethan
Guest: Priya
Ethan: Welcome back to Practical Systems.
Today we’re talking about on-call that doesn’t break people, and I’m joined by Priya.
I’m excited—this is a topic people care about, and there’s a lot of practical nuance.

summary_text:
# Practical Systems — Episode
## On-Call That Doesn’t Break People
Host: Ethan
Guest: Priya
Ethan: Welcome back to Practical Systems.
Today we’re talking about on-call that doesn’t break people, and I’m joined by Priya.
I’m excited—this is a topic people care about, and there’s a lot of practical nuance.
